pids.name: Driver's Demand Engine - Percent Torque
pids.name_zh: 驾驶员需求发动机百分比扭矩
pids.description: TQ_DD displays the requested torque from the propulsion system engine by the driver, inclusive of all torque contributors. Transmitted as indicated torque as a percent of reference engine torque (PID $63). TQ_DD will be approximately zero at idle with zero vehicle speed.
pids.description_zh: TQ_DD显示驾驶员对驱动系统发动机的需求扭矩，包含所有扭矩贡献者。以参考发动机扭矩(PID $63)的百分比传输指示扭矩。怠速且车速为零时TQ_DD约为零。

items.label: TQ_DD
items.name: Driver's Demand Engine - Percent Torque
items.name_zh: 驾驶员需求发动机百分比扭矩

pids.name: Actual Engine - Percent Torque
pids.name_zh: 实际发动机百分比扭矩
pids.description: TQ_ACT displays calculated output torque of the engine (indicated torque = net brake torque + friction torque). Transmitted as a percent of engine reference torque (PID $63). Will not be less than zero.
pids.description_zh: TQ_ACT显示发动机计算输出扭矩（指示扭矩=净制动扭矩+摩擦扭矩）。以参考发动机扭矩(PID $63)的百分比传输。不会小于零。

items.label: TQ_ACT
items.name: Actual Engine - Percent Torque
items.name_zh: 实际发动机百分比扭矩

pids.name: Engine Reference Torque
pids.description: TQ_REF is the 100% reference value for all defined indicated engine torque parameters. Defined once; does not change if a different engine torque map becomes valid.
pids.description_zh: TQ_REF是所有已定义指示发动机扭矩参数的100%参考值。仅定义一次；更换发动机扭矩映射时不变。

pids.name: Engine Percent Torque Data
pids.name_zh: 发动机百分比扭矩数据
pids.description: 5-point torque map describing stationary engine behavior. Reflects barometric pressure, engine temperature, and other stationary changes >10%. Only valid for max boost pressure. One of points 3/4/5 must indicate peak torque. Points 3-5 lie between idle (point 1) and point 2.
pids.description_zh: 描述发动机稳态特性的5点扭矩映射。反映气压、发动机温度及其他>10%的稳态变化。仅在最大增压压力下有效。点3/4/5中必须有一点表示峰值扭矩。点3-5位于怠速(点1)和点2之间。

items.label: TQ_MAX1
items.name: Engine Percent Torque At Idle, Point 1
items.name_zh: 怠速时发动机百分比扭矩，点1

pids.name: Auxiliary Inputs/Output Status
pids.description: Byte A reports support status of PTO, Auto/Manual trans, glow plug lamp, and recommended gear. Byte B reports actual status and recommended gear value (bits 4-7).
pids.description_zh: 字节A报告PTO、自动/手动变速器、预热指示灯和推荐挡位的支持状态。字节B报告实际状态和推荐挡位值（位4-7）。

bits.name: Power Take Off (PTO) Output Status Supported
bits.name_zh: 动力输出(PTO)输出状态支持

bits.name: Auto Trans Neutral/Drive Status Supported
bits.name_zh: 自动变速器空挡/行驶状态支持

bits.name: Manual Trans Neutral/Gear Status Supported
bits.name_zh: 手动变速器空挡/挡位状态支持

bits.name: Auto Trans Neutral/Drive Status
bits.name_zh: 自动变速器空挡/行驶状态

bits.name: Manual Trans Neutral/Gear Status
bits.name_zh: 手动变速器空挡/挡位状态

pids.name: Mass Air Flow Sensor
pids.description: MAF A/B display airflow rate from MAF sensor or equivalent. If engine off and ignition on, report actual sensor reading; if unavailable, report 0.00 g/s. Vehicles with two MAF sensors use MAF A and MAF B.
pids.description_zh: MAF A/B显示MAF传感器或等效来源的空气流量。发动机关闭且点火开启时报告实际传感器读数；无法获取时报告0.00 g/s。双MAF传感器车辆使用MAF A和MAF B。

items.label: MAF_SUP
items.name: Support of Mass Air Flow Sensor Data
items.name_zh: 空气流量传感器数据支持

pids.name: Engine Coolant Temperature
pids.description: ECT 1/2 display engine coolant temperature derived from an engine coolant temperature sensor or a cylinder head temperature sensor.
pids.description_zh: ECT 1/2显示由发动机冷却液温度传感器或气缸盖温度传感器获取的发动机冷却液温度。

items.label: ECT_SUP
items.name: Support of Engine Coolant Temperature Sensor Data
items.name_zh: 发动机冷却液温度传感器数据支持

pids.name: Intake Air Temperature
pids.description: IAT Bank 1/2, Sensor 1/2/3 display intake manifold air temperature. May be from sensor or inferred by control strategy.
pids.description_zh: IAT气缸组1/2传感器1/2/3显示进气歧管空气温度。可来自传感器或由控制策略推算。

items.label: IAT_SUP
items.name: Support of Intake Air Temperature Sensor Data
items.name_zh: 进气温度传感器数据支持

items.label: IAT11
items.name: Intake Air Temperature Bank 1, Sensor 1
items.name_zh: 进气温度 气缸组1，传感器1

items.label: IAT12
items.name: Intake Air Temperature Bank 1, Sensor 2
items.name_zh: 进气温度 气缸组1，传感器2

items.label: IAT13
items.name: Intake Air Temperature Bank 1, Sensor 3
items.name_zh: 进气温度 气缸组1，传感器3

items.label: IAT21
items.name: Intake Air Temperature Bank 2, Sensor 1
items.name_zh: 进气温度 气缸组2，传感器1

items.label: IAT22
items.name: Intake Air Temperature Bank 2, Sensor 2
items.name_zh: 进气温度 气缸组2，传感器2

items.label: IAT23
items.name: Intake Air Temperature Bank 2, Sensor 3
items.name_zh: 进气温度 气缸组2，传感器3

pids.name: Commanded EGR and EGR Error
pids.description: EGR A/B commanded duty cycle/position (0%=no flow, 100%=max flow), actual duty cycle/position, and error ((actual-commanded)/commanded × 100%). If closed loop not used, actual and error shall not be supported.
pids.description_zh: EGR A/B指令占空比/位置（0%=无流量，100%=最大流量）、实际占空比/位置和误差（(实际-指令)/指令 × 100%）。未使用闭环控制时，实际值和误差不应支持。

bits.name: Commanded EGR A Duty Cycle/Position Supported
bits.name_zh: 指令EGR A占空比/位置支持

bits.name: Actual EGR A Duty Cycle/Position Supported
bits.name_zh: 实际EGR A占空比/位置支持

bits.name: Commanded EGR B Duty Cycle/Position Supported
bits.name_zh: 指令EGR B占空比/位置支持

bits.name: Actual EGR B Duty Cycle/Position Supported
bits.name_zh: 实际EGR B占空比/位置支持

pids.name: Commanded Diesel Intake Air Flow Control and Relative Intake Air Flow Position
pids.name_zh: 指令柴油进气流量控制与相对进气流量位置
pids.description: Intake Air Flow (also known as EGR Throttle on CI). IAF_A/B_CMD = commanded position (0%=closed, 100%=open). IAF_A/B_REL = relative (learned) position (0%=learned closed, 100%=full open).
pids.description_zh: 进气流量（在压燃式发动机上也称为EGR节气门）。IAF_A/B_CMD=指令位置（0%=关，100%=开）。IAF_A/B_REL=相对（学习）位置（0%=学习关闭位置，100%=全开）。

items.label: IAF_SUP
items.name: Support of Intake Air Flow Control System Data
items.name_zh: 进气流量控制系统数据支持

items.label: IAF_A_CMD
items.name: Commanded Intake Air Flow A Control

items.label: IAF_A_REL
items.name: Relative Intake Air Flow A Position

items.label: IAF_B_CMD
items.name: Commanded Intake Air Flow B Control

items.label: IAF_B_REL
items.name: Relative Intake Air Flow B Position

bits.name: Commanded Intake Air Flow A Control supported
bits.name_zh: 指令进气流量A控制支持

bits.name: Relative Intake Air Flow A Position supported
bits.name_zh: 相对进气流量A位置支持

bits.name: Commanded Intake Air Flow B Control supported
bits.name_zh: 指令进气流量B控制支持

bits.name: Relative Intake Air Flow B Position supported
bits.name_zh: 相对进气流量B位置支持

pids.name: Exhaust Gas Recirculation Temperature
pids.description: EGR temperature for sensors A(B1S1), C(B1S2), B(B2S1), D(B2S2). Scaling depends on support bits: bits 0-3 = 1°C/bit with -40°C offset (range -40~215°C); bits 4-7 = 4°C/bit with -40°C offset (range -40~980°C). Only one scaling per sensor shall be active.
pids.description_zh: EGR温度传感器A(组1传感器1)、C(组1传感器2)、B(组2传感器1)、D(组2传感器2)。缩放取决于支持位：位0-3=1°C/位带-40°C偏移（范围-40~215°C）；位4-7=4°C/位带-40°C偏移（范围-40~980°C）。每个传感器仅一种缩放有效。

items.label: EGRT_SUP
items.name: Support of EGR Temperature Sensor Data

items.label: EGRTA
items.name: EGR Temp Sensor A (Bank 1, Sensor 1)
items.name_zh: EGR温度传感器A（气缸组1，传感器1）

items.label: EGRTC
items.name: EGR Temp Sensor C (Bank 1, Sensor 2)
items.name_zh: EGR温度传感器C（气缸组1，传感器2）

items.label: EGRTB
items.name: EGR Temp Sensor B (Bank 2, Sensor 1)
items.name_zh: EGR温度传感器B（气缸组2，传感器1）

items.label: EGRTD
items.name: EGR Temp Sensor D (Bank 2, Sensor 2)
items.name_zh: EGR温度传感器D（气缸组2，传感器2）

bits.name: EGR Temp Sensor A (B1S1) supported – 1°C/bit
bits.name_zh: EGR温度传感器A(组1传感器1)支持 – 1°C/位

bits.name: EGR Temp Sensor C (B1S2) supported – 1°C/bit
bits.name_zh: EGR温度传感器C(组1传感器2)支持 – 1°C/位

bits.name: EGR Temp Sensor B (B2S1) supported – 1°C/bit
bits.name_zh: EGR温度传感器B(组2传感器1)支持 – 1°C/位

bits.name: EGR Temp Sensor D (B2S2) supported – 1°C/bit
bits.name_zh: EGR温度传感器D(组2传感器2)支持 – 1°C/位

bits.name: EGR Temp Sensor A (B1S1) Wide Range – 4°C/bit
bits.name_zh: EGR温度传感器A(组1传感器1)宽域 – 4°C/位

bits.name: EGR Temp Sensor C (B1S2) Wide Range – 4°C/bit
bits.name_zh: EGR温度传感器C(组1传感器2)宽域 – 4°C/位

bits.name: EGR Temp Sensor B (B2S1) Wide Range – 4°C/bit
bits.name_zh: EGR温度传感器B(组2传感器1)宽域 – 4°C/位

bits.name: EGR Temp Sensor D (B2S2) Wide Range – 4°C/bit
bits.name_zh: EGR温度传感器D(组2传感器2)宽域 – 4°C/位

pids.note: Decoder must check byte A support bits to determine scaling: bits 0-3 → formula X-40, bits 4-7 → formula X*4-40. Only one scaling per sensor shall be active.

pids.name: Commanded Throttle Actuator Control and Relative Throttle Position
pids.name_zh: 指令节气门执行器控制与相对节气门位置
pids.description: TAC_A/B_CMD = commanded throttle position (0%=closed, 100%=open). TP_A/B_REL = relative (learned) throttle position (0%=learned closed, WOT usually <100%).
pids.description_zh: TAC_A/B_CMD=指令节气门位置（0%=关，100%=开）。TP_A/B_REL=相对（学习）节气门位置（0%=学习关闭位置，全开通常<100%）。

items.label: TAC_SUP
items.name: Support of Throttle Actuator Control System Data
items.name_zh: 节气门执行器控制系统数据支持

items.label: TAC_A_CMD
items.name: Commanded Throttle Actuator A Control
items.name_zh: 指令节气门执行器A控制

items.label: TAC_B_CMD
items.name: Commanded Throttle Actuator B Control
items.name_zh: 指令节气门执行器B控制

bits.name: Commanded Throttle Actuator A Control supported
bits.name_zh: 指令节气门执行器A控制支持

bits.name: Commanded Throttle Actuator B Control supported
bits.name_zh: 指令节气门执行器B控制支持

pids.name: Fuel Pressure Control System
pids.description: Commanded and actual fuel rail pressure A/B (gage, referenced to atmosphere), and fuel rail temperature A/B. Pressure: 10 kPa/bit unsigned. Temperature: 1°C with -40°C offset.
pids.description_zh: 指令和实际燃油轨压力A/B（表压，以大气为基准），以及燃油轨温度A/B。压力：10 kPa/位无符号。温度：1°C带-40°C偏移。

items.label: FRP_SUP
items.name: Support of Fuel Pressure Control System Data
items.name_zh: 燃油压力控制系统数据支持

bits.name: Commanded Fuel Rail Pressure A supported
Commanded Fuel Rail Pressure B supported

pids.name: Injection Pressure Control System
pids.description: Commanded and actual injection control pressure A/B. 10 kPa/bit unsigned.
pids.description_zh: 指令和实际喷射控制压力A/B。10 kPa/位无符号。

items.label: ICP_SUP
items.name: Support of Injection Pressure Control System Data
items.name_zh: 喷射压力控制系统数据支持

bits.name: Commanded Injection Control Pressure A supported
bits.name_zh: 指令喷射控制压力A支持

bits.name: Commanded Injection Control Pressure B supported
bits.name_zh: 指令喷射控制压力B支持

pids.name: Turbocharger Compressor Inlet Pressure
pids.name_zh: 增压器压缩机入口压力
pids.description: Turbocharger A/B compressor inlet pressure. Scaling depends on support bits: bits 0-1 = 1 kPa/bit (0~255 kPa); bits 2-3 = 8 kPa/bit (0~2040 kPa). Only one scaling per sensor shall be active.
pids.description_zh: 增压器A/B压缩机入口压力。缩放取决于支持位：位0-1=1 kPa/位（0~255 kPa）；位2-3=8 kPa/位（0~2040 kPa）。每个传感器仅一种缩放有效。

items.label: TCINP_SUP
items.name: Support of Turbocharger Compressor Inlet Pressure Sensor Data
items.name_zh: 增压器压缩机入口压力传感器数据支持

items.label: TCA_CINP
items.name: Turbocharger Compressor Inlet Pressure Sensor A
items.name_zh: 增压器A压缩机入口压力传感器
items.note: Standard: A.0=1, 1 kPa/bit (0~255). Wide: A.2=1, 8 kPa/bit (0~2040)

items.label: TCB_CINP
items.name: Turbocharger Compressor Inlet Pressure Sensor B
items.name_zh: 增压器B压缩机入口压力传感器
items.note: Standard: A.1=1, 1 kPa/bit (0~255). Wide: A.3=1, 8 kPa/bit (0~2040)

bits.name: TC Compressor Inlet Pressure Sensor A – 1 kPa/bit
bits.name_zh: 增压器入口压力传感器A – 1 kPa/位

bits.name: TC Compressor Inlet Pressure Sensor B – 1 kPa/bit
bits.name_zh: 增压器入口压力传感器B – 1 kPa/位

bits.name: TC Compressor Inlet Pressure Sensor A Wide Range – 8 kPa/bit
bits.name_zh: 增压器入口压力传感器A宽域 – 8 kPa/位

bits.name: TC Compressor Inlet Pressure Sensor B Wide Range – 8 kPa/bit
bits.name_zh: 增压器入口压力传感器B宽域 – 8 kPa/位

pids.note: Decoder must check byte A support bits to determine scaling per sensor.

pids.name: Boost Pressure Control
pids.description: Commanded and actual boost pressure A/B (0.03125 kPa/bit, 0~2047.97 kPa). Byte J contains control status for A (bits 0-1) and B (bits 2-3): 00=reserved, 01=open loop, 10=closed loop, 11=fault.
pids.description_zh: 指令和实际增压压力A/B（0.03125 kPa/位，0~2047.97 kPa）。字节J包含A（位0-1）和B（位2-3）的控制状态：00=保留，01=开环，10=闭环，11=故障。

items.label: BP_SUP
items.name: Support of Boost Pressure Control Data
items.name_zh: 增压压力控制数据支持

bits.name: Boost Pressure A Control Status supported
bits.name_zh: 增压压力A控制状态支持

bits.name: Boost Pressure B Control Status supported
bits.name_zh: 增压压力B控制状态支持

pids.name: Variable Geometry Turbo Control
pids.description: Commanded and actual VGT A/B vane position (0%=bypassed, 100%=utilized). Byte F contains control status for A (bits 0-1) and B (bits 2-3): 00=reserved, 01=open loop, 10=closed loop, 11=fault.
pids.description_zh: 指令和实际VGT A/B叶片位置（0%=旁通，100%=工作）。字节F包含A（位0-1）和B（位2-3）的控制状态：00=保留，01=开环，10=闭环，11=故障。

items.label: VGT_SUP
items.name: Support of Variable Geometry Turbo Control Data
items.name_zh: 可变几何增压器控制数据支持

items.label: VGT_A_CMD
items.name: Commanded Variable Geometry Turbo A Position

items.label: VGT_B_CMD
items.name: Commanded Variable Geometry Turbo B Position

pids.name: Wastegate Control
pids.description: Commanded and actual wastegate A/B position (0%=closed/full boost, 100%=open/dump boost).
pids.description_zh: 指令和实际废气旁通阀A/B位置（0%=关闭/全增压，100%=打开/泄压）。

items.label: WG_SUP
items.name: Support of Wastegate Control Data
items.name_zh: 废气旁通阀控制数据支持

bits.name: Commanded Wastegate A Position supported
bits.name_zh: 指令废气旁通阀A位置支持

bits.name: Commanded Wastegate B Position supported
bits.name_zh: 指令废气旁通阀B位置支持

pids.name: Exhaust Pressure
pids.description: Exhaust pressure sensor Bank 1/2. 0.01 kPa/bit unsigned.
pids.description_zh: 排气压力传感器 气缸组1/2。0.01 kPa/位无符号。

items.label: EP_SUP
items.name: Support of Exhaust Pressure Sensor Data
items.name_zh: 排气压力传感器数据支持

items.label: EP_1
items.name: Exhaust Pressure Sensor Bank 1
items.name_zh: 排气压力传感器 气缸组1

items.name: Exhaust Pressure Sensor Bank 2
items.name_zh: 排气压力传感器 气缸组2

bits.name: Exhaust Pressure Sensor Bank 1 supported
bits.name_zh: 排气压力传感器气缸组1支持

bits.name: Exhaust Pressure Sensor Bank 2 supported
bits.name_zh: 排气压力传感器气缸组2支持

pids.name: Turbocharger RPM
pids.description: Turbocharger A/B RPM. 10 rpm/bit unsigned.
pids.description_zh: 增压器A/B转速。10 rpm/位无符号。

pids.name: Turbocharger A Temperature
pids.description: Turbocharger A compressor inlet/outlet temperature (1°C/bit, -40~215°C) and turbine inlet/outlet temperature (0.1°C/bit, -40~6513.5°C).
pids.description_zh: 增压器A压缩机入口/出口温度（1°C/位，-40~215°C）和涡轮入口/出口温度（0.1°C/位，-40~6513.5°C）。

items.label: TCA_T_SUP
items.name: Support of Turbocharger A Temperature Data

items.name_zh: 增压器A压缩机出口温度

bits.name: Turbo A Compressor Outlet Temperature supported
bits.name_zh: 增压器A压缩机出口温度支持

bits.name_zh: 增压器A涡轮入口温度支持

pids.name: Turbocharger B Temperature
pids.description: Turbocharger B compressor inlet/outlet temperature (1°C/bit, -40~215°C) and turbine inlet/outlet temperature (0.1°C/bit, -40~6513.5°C).
pids.description_zh: 增压器B压缩机入口/出口温度（1°C/位，-40~215°C）和涡轮入口/出口温度（0.1°C/位，-40~6513.5°C）。

items.name: Turbocharger B Compressor Inlet Temperature

items.name_zh: 增压器B压缩机出口温度

bits.name_zh: 增压器B涡轮出口温度支持

pids.name: Charge Air Cooler Temperature
pids.description: Charge air cooler temperature Bank 1/2, Sensor 1/2. 1°C/bit with -40°C offset.
pids.description_zh: 中冷器温度 气缸组1/2，传感器1/2。1°C/位带-40°C偏移。

items.label: CACT_SUP
items.name: Support of Charge Air Cooler Temperature Data

items.label: CACT11
items.name: Charge Air Cooler Temperature Bank 1, Sensor 1
items.name_zh: 中冷器温度 气缸组1，传感器1

pids.name: Exhaust Gas Temperature Bank 1

pids.name: Diesel Particulate Filter Temperature
pids.description: DPF Bank 1/2 inlet/outlet temperature. 0.1°C/bit with -40°C offset (-40~6513.5°C). Preferable to use EGT PIDs $78/$79/$98/$99 to preserve standard exhaust gas sensor numbering.
pids.description_zh: DPF气缸组1/2入口/出口温度。0.1°C/位带-40°C偏移（-40~6513.5°C）。建议优先使用EGT PID $78/$79/$98/$99以保持标准排气传感器编号。

pids.name: NOx NTE Control Area Status
pids.description: Reports whether engine is operating inside/outside the NOx NTE control area, manufacturer-specific carve-out area, or NTE deficiency active area. Not applicable to spark-ignition engines.
pids.description_zh: 报告发动机是否在NOx NTE控制区域内/外、制造商特定豁免区域内或NTE缺陷活动区域内运行。不适用于点火式发动机。

bits.name: Inside manufacturer-specific NOx NTE carve-out area
bits.name_zh: 在制造商特定NOx NTE豁免区域内

bits.name: NTE deficiency for NOx active area

pids.note: PID $7D is not applicable to spark-ignition engines.

pids.name: PM NTE Control Area Status
pids.description: Reports whether engine is operating inside/outside the PM NTE control area, manufacturer-specific carve-out area, or NTE deficiency active area.
pids.description_zh: 报告发动机是否在PM NTE控制区域内/外、制造商特定豁免区域内或NTE缺陷活动区域内运行。

bits.name: Inside manufacturer-specific PM NTE carve-out area
bits.name_zh: 在制造商特定PM NTE豁免区域内

bits.name: NTE deficiency for PM active area

pids.name: Engine Run Time
pids.description: Total engine run time, total idle run time, and total run time with PTO active. 1 sec/bit, 4-byte counters (0~4,294,967,295 sec). If any counter reaches max, all counters shall be divided by two before incrementing. Reset only on non-volatile memory reset (e.g. reprogramming); not reset by scan tool clear codes.
pids.description_zh: 总发动机运行时间、总怠速运行时间和PTO激活总运行时间。1秒/位，4字节计数器（0~4,294,967,295秒）。任一计数器达到最大值时，所有计数器除以2后再递增。仅在非易失性存储器重置（如重新编程）时清零；扫描工具清除故障码不会清零。

items.label: PTO_TIME
items.name: Total Run Time With PTO Active

bits.name: Total Engine Run Time supported
bits.name_zh: 总发动机运行时间支持

bits.name: Total Run Time With PTO Active supported

pids.note: Counters are NOT reset by Service $04 or any scan tool command. Only reset on non-volatile memory reset (e.g. reprogramming event). If any counter reaches $FFFFFFFF, all three are divided by 2 before any is incremented again.
